about.title: AUTHENTIC ARGENTINE CUISINE
about.description: Experience the true taste of Argentina in the heart of Miami. From our famous empanadas to premium grilled meats, every dish is crafted with traditional recipes and passion.

reservation.title: RESERVE YOUR TABLE
reservation.subtitle: Book online and we'll confirm via phone

contact.title: GET IN TOUCH
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

hours.title: STORE HOURS
hours.promo_text: On the day of your birthday and up to five days after or before, come with your family and friends to celebrate at SABORES ARGENTINOS and we give you a bottle of Argentinean wine for free. This promotion is valid for parties of two or more people.

menu.title: OUR MENU
menu.subtitle: Authentic Argentine Cuisine
menu.disclaimer: Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of food borne illness, especially to those whom have certain medical conditions. Shared plates have an additional charge of $3.00

shows.title: DINNER SHOWS & EVENTS
shows.subtitle: Experience Tango and Bolero nights in Miami

catering.title: CATERING & ON-SITE COOKING
catering.subtitle: Bring the authentic Argentine asado to your home or office
catering.description: We offer on-site asado catering for your special events. Our team will come to your location and prepare authentic Argentine grilled meats fresh for your guests.

footer.newsletter: Subscribe to our newsletter for specials & events!
